item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 11,837 words across all notes.

item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes Baseball choke Two grip choke on turtle Close guard overhook stiff Crusifix Straight ankle lock Grip break on upper back Cross collar grip break to takedown Collar grip break downward Double ankle grab pass Closed guard standing up Double under Closed guard figure 8 Toreando Leg drag ...

item.title: Empty_Pages
item.description: Empty Notes Canto choke Kimura Estima lock Gogoplata North south Figure-four grip Double leg Rubber guard .

item.title: Recently_Updated
item.description: Recently Updated Notes README Formatting 2025-09-23 index Kimura & Americana Three sisters Buggy choke Bow and arrow Windshield wiper choke Papercutter .

Leg attack sequence from no gi Reverse DLR Opponent counters with Estima Roll sideways to try to get underneath Leads to turtle or backtake, but needs to control the legs strictly If not possible keep rolling further and attack the other leg Remain on shoulders to better angle upward Original dlr le...

item.title: Berimbolo
item.description: General Berimbolo is essentially an attack system to take the back.

item.title: Uchimata
item.description: General Literally translates to inner-thigh reaping throw. Extremely common in judo.

item.title: Sit up guard
item.description: General Not really a guard in the strictest sense, but rather a Shin to shin -like position where you are sitting close to opponents leg and have a good control over it with arm and leg.

item.title: De La Riva and Reverse De La Riva
Ankle pick
item.description: General Great setup for standing where you literally pick up the opponents ankle to look for variety of different takedowns Setup Forward arc Get a Thumb and cuff grip on the opponents Sleeve on the same side.
